reference: Hi, is Nutrilite protein powder good for cancer patients? My aunt already had breast cancer surgery and completed her one-year course of medication after the surgery, and now she is almost fine regarding her cancer. Now she has high blood pressure and she is a diabetic patient. Can you please suggest if it is good for her to consume Nutrilite protein powder?
text: Hi, is Nutrilite protein powder good for cancer patients? My aunt already had breast cancer surgery and completed her 1-year course of medication after the surgery, and now she is almost fine regarding her cancer. Now she has high blood pressure and she is a diabetic patient. Can you please suggest if it is good for her to consume Nutrilite protein powder?
